title: Christmas Stainless Steel Cookie Cutters – Pack of 5 Holiday Biscuit Cutters – Star, Heart, Tree, House & Gingerbread Man Shapes for Festive Baking
features: Festive Baking Fun: Bake Christmas cookies, biscuits, or fondant decorations with this set of 5 stainless steel cutters in classic holiday shapes – star, heart, tree, house, and gingerbread man.
Durable & Reusable: Made from high-quality stainless steel, these cutters are strong, easy to clean, and reusable – perfect for festive baking year after year.
Perfect for Family Baking: Great for baking with kids, holiday parties, or gift-giving – a must-have accessory for Christmas baking traditions and fun family activities.
description: Pack contains: Star - 6cm / 2.4 in Heart - 6cm / 2.4 in Tree - 7cm x 4cm / 2.8 in x 1.6 in House - 6cm x 5cm / 2.4 in x 2 in Gingerbread Man - 6cm x 5.5cm / 2.4 in x 2.2 in Material: Stainless Steel Packaging design may vary.
